landing.hero: What kind of care do you need today?
landing.subtitle: Answer a few quick questions. We'll help you find the right place to go.
landing.trustPrivateBody: We don't save your name or anything personal.
landing.trustFreeBody: Our Virtual Care line is free, day or night.
landing.trustSpanishBody: Tap "ES" above to switch the language.
landing.crisis: Need to talk to someone right now?

emergency.title: Are you feeling any of these right now?
emergency.body: If you pick any of these, we'll help you call 911.
emergency.noneOfThese: I don't have any of these
emergency.alertBody: What you described can be life-threatening. Don't wait — help is a tap away.
emergency.alertText: Or text 911 if you cannot call

careType.title: What kind of help do you need?
careType.subtitle: Pick the one closest to your problem. If you are not sure, tap "I'm not sure".
careType.notSure: I'm not sure — help me decide

virtualCareInterstitial.heading: You may be able to get free care right now

results.heading: Based on your answers, here's what we recommend
results.eligibility: Check if you qualify for free care

location.zipPrompt: Enter your ZIP code to find the closest options
location.zipNotFound: That ZIP code wasn't found. Double-check the digits and try again.

crisis.heading: Suicide Prevention
crisis.body: Talk to someone now. You are not alone, and help is available right now.
crisis.lifelineBody: Available 24/7 across the United States. Free and confidential for everyone.
crisis.csbBody: Each Community Services Board (CSB) has 24-hour emergency services.

spiritualCare.hubSubtitle: Pick the kind of support that feels right for you today.
spiritualCare.prayerDescription: Send our team an email and we'll read and pray for you.
spiritualCare.churchDescription: Enter your ZIP code to see local congregations.
spiritualCare.chaplainDescription: Call during daytime hours — we're here to listen.
spiritualCare.prayerBody: Tap below to open your email app with a message ready to send to our spiritual care team. Write as much or as little as you'd like — we'll read and pray for you.
spiritualCare.prayerPrivacyNote: Your message goes from your email directly to our team. Nothing is stored on this site.
spiritualCare.chaplainBody: A chaplain is available by phone during daytime hours. If you reach voicemail, leave your name and number — we'll call you back.
spiritualCare.chaplainPrivacyNote: Your call goes directly to our chaplain line. Nothing is stored on this site.
spiritualCare.crisisLineBody: If you're thinking about hurting yourself or someone else, call or text 988 — the Suicide and Crisis Lifeline. It's free and available 24/7.
spiritualCare.churchBody: Enter your ZIP code and we'll show churches within about 10 miles.
spiritualCare.churchNoResults: We couldn't find churches near that ZIP. Try a different ZIP or contact Lackey Clinic for help.
spiritualCare.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again or call Lackey Clinic at (757) 547-7484.
spiritualCare.requiredField: Please enter a valid ZIP code.

locationScreen.heading: You need urgent care soon
locationScreen.body: Share your location and we'll find the closest urgent care facilities within 10 miles.
locationScreen.searching: Finding the nearest urgent care near you…
locationScreen.privacyNote: Your location is used only to find nearby care. It is not saved or shared.

disclaimers.heading: Important Information
disclaimers.notEmergency: This is not a replacement for emergency services. If you are experiencing a medical emergency, call 911.
disclaimers.notEligibility: This tool does not determine insurance eligibility or enrollment.
disclaimers.noAppointmentGuarantee: Appointment availability is not guaranteed and depends on provider capacity.
disclaimers.noSeriousMentalIllness: This service is not intended for serious mental illness crises. Call the crisis line at (757) 664-6000.
disclaimers.noControlledSubstances: Controlled substances will not be prescribed through virtual care visits.

common.errorTitle: We're having trouble loading this page
